name: Progressive Context Injector
description: Configuration-driven progressive context injection for OpenClaw agents. Injects full shared context on the first turn and a compact reminder on subsequent turns. Registers a workspace_context tool for on-demand file access.

sharedDir.description: Directory containing shared context files, relative to workspace root. Defaults to 'agents' if it exists, otherwise workspace root.

globalFiles.description: Map of file IDs to filenames for global (non-agent-specific) reference files, relative to sharedDir.

agentFiles.description: Map of file IDs to filenames for per-agent reference files. Resolved as sharedDir/{agentId}/{filename}, falling back to workspace root.

compactReminder.description: Inline compact reminder text injected on turn 2+. Mutually exclusive with compactReminderFile.

compactReminderFile.description: Path to a file containing the compact reminder text, relative to workspace root.

contextRoutingIndex.description: Inline context/tool routing index text. Injected on first turn for agents with injectRoutingIndex: true.

contextRoutingIndexFile.description: Path to a file containing the routing index, relative to workspace root.

agents.description: Per-agent configuration. Use '*' as the key for default/wildcard config. Agent-specific keys override the wildcard.

firstTurnFiles.description: List of filenames (in sharedDir) to inject on the first turn.

injectRoutingIndex.description: If true, inject the context routing index on the first turn.

bootstrapKeep.description: Filenames to keep in full during bootstrap.

bootstrapCompact.description: Map of filename to compact stub text. These files are replaced with a short summary during bootstrap.

skipAgents.description: List of agent IDs to skip entirely (no injection, no bootstrap filtering).

bootstrapDedup.description: Enable same-name file deduplication during bootstrap. Defaults to true.
